title: Automations for when subitems are created
excerpt:
I would like to be able to create automations for when a subitem is created. For example: when subitem is created: set subitem creator as subitem “Person” and set or push subitem “Date” to X.

posts.author: katelynprice (Katelyn Price)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to create automations for when a subitem is created. For example: when subitem is created: set subitem creator as subitem “Person” and set or push subitem “Date” to X.

This will help me create similar workflow that I have present on regular items, and reduce manual work.

posts.author: Michael_H (Michael_H)
posts.cookedHtml: I was looking into this too. For assets tracking, I’d like a (purchase) date or status to be added from the main item.
